title: toona ciliata var. pilistila
intro: Toona ciliata var. pilistila, also known as the Western Toona or Batai, is a tree species native to the tropical regions of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which contain compounds with anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Toona ciliata var. pilistila include reducing fever, alleviating pain and inflammation, and treating respiratory infections, as well as being used to treat certain types of cancer. Toona ciliata var. pilistila can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
